title: Xtra Juicy Korean Tofu Dosirak
description: A rich and juicy Korean dish featuring crispy tofu and savory sauce, perfect for a weeknight meal. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is grilled to perfection and served in a dosirak box.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, Gochujang, brown sugar, and garlic.
Add the tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Brush the grill or grill pan with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the tofu for 3-4 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the tofu is cooking, prepare the dosirak boxes with a layer of cooked white rice.
Once the tofu is done, place it on top of the rice in the dosirak boxes.
Sprinkle chopped green onions and sesame seeds over the top of the tofu.
